summary: Statistics Tab (إحصائيات) feature testing complete. All 4 tabs working correctly. Frontend-only feature verified - all UI components rendering properly.

All 4 tabs exist in TabsList: الخريطة, المناطق, التغييرات, إحصائيات
Tab 1 (Map/الخريطة): Shows map container with zone polygons
Tab 2 (Zones/المناطق): Shows 3 zone cards with badge showing count
Tab 3 (Changes/التغييرات): Loads correctly showing change information
Tab 4 (Stats/إحصائيات): NEW TAB - All components verified
Stats KPI row displays 4 cards: Active(3), Removed(0), Changes(3), Categories(3)
Donut chart shows category distribution with proper colors and total count (3)
Category breakdown table shows 3 rows: men_prayer, women_prayer, men_rakatayn
Each category row shows count (1), progress bar, and percentage (33%)
Previous Day Comparison panel correctly NOT shown (only 1 session exists)
Tab switching works correctly between all 4 tabs without breaking anything

seed_data_creation: Using existing Feb 17, 2026 session with 3 zones (men_prayer, women_prayer, men_rakatayn)
